prompt: Create a vertical 3:4 cinematic cyberpunk portrait of an elegant adult woman standing indoors against a floor-to-ceiling glass window at night, overlooking a dense futuristic megacity filled with skyscrapers, rain-speckled reflections, glowing blue, cyan, purple, and magenta neon signs. The woman is centered in a medium close-up from head to upper torso, with dark hair loosely tied back, a visible ear with small earrings, and a luxurious translucent dark floral robe or kimono with a deep neckline, shimmering wet-looking fabric, gold embroidery, ornate gold filigree shoulder armor on one shoulder, and a matching decorative gold choker collar. The glass should create layered reflections of city lights across her body and clothing, giving a double-exposure effect. Add a large flat opaque square censor block over the center of her face, colored dark muted brown-gray, perfectly rectangular and covering the eyes, nose, and mouth while leaving hair, ear, neck, and clothing visible. In the background, include exactly one prominent vertical neon sign on the right with large Chinese characters reading 未来已来 and a smaller English subtitle below reading FUTURE CITY. Style the scene as hyper-detailed photorealistic sci-fi noir, moody rainy-night atmosphere, high contrast, glossy reflections, shallow depth of field, volumetric glow, intricate fabric texture, ornate metallic details, and vibrant neon lighting. Use blue, violet, magenta, cyan lighting, a vertical medium close-up portrait, and a luxurious cyberpunk melancholy. Avoid extra people, avoid logos, avoid additional readable text beyond the specified signs.
